---
#title: "Themes"
lightbox: true
---

::: {.column-page}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-7}
## Drones and lidar 
Sample Text Here. Section about lidar technology here, in relation to willow density mapping.
:::

::: {.g-col-5}
![The drone is flying.](media/flight.png)
:::
 
::: {.g-col-5}
![The drone is parked.](media/drone.jpg)
:::

::: {.g-col-7}
## Willow gender mapping
Sample Text Here. Section about willow gender mapping.
:::

::: {.g-col-7}
## Bumblebee Pollination
Sample Text Here. Section about bumblebees and pollination. More images needed.
:::

::: {.g-col-5}
![A glacier model.](media/pism.png)
:::

:::
 
:::
